data.title: 国际服参展Anime Expo 2024
data.summary: Blue Archive is coming to Anime Expo 2024💙 We have a bunch of exciting events planned, like Cosplay
data.body:
Blue Archive is coming to Anime Expo 2024💙
We have a bunch of exciting events planned, like Cosplay Photo Time, DJing Time, a Drawing Event, and more!

🗓️July 4th - July 7th (PT)
🗺️Los Angeles Convention Center
📍 South Hall Lobby @ SF7, Entertainment Hall @ E55

#BlueArchive #AX2024![FxvWWdxoN0ia6j1XJ0LhAKQpwLL5rZZG.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/FxvWWdxoN0ia6j1XJ0LhAKQpwLL5rZZG.jpg)

The Blue Archive devs are coming to Anime Expo 2024💙
It’s your chance to hear from Yongha Kim, Lead Director; Gukki Kim, Art Director; and Mitsukiyo, Music Director, about the behind-the-scenes story of Blue Archive!

🗓️July 5th 10:30 - 11:50 AM (PT)
📍Panel Room @ 403AB

#BlueArchive #AX2024
![tyxLV2OIZsMHNysQFHePtrcTVmXo7w7Z.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/tyxLV2OIZsMHNysQFHePtrcTVmXo7w7Z.jpg)


[Blue Archive - Anime Expo 2024]

Hello Sensei!
Blue Archive booth is live at #AX2024!
Come find us at ENTERTAINMENT HALL BOOTH(E55) & South Hall Lobby(SF7)

#BlueArchive
![8HGiyBsmSWM0Wd4tenvDMf8rKr2dbfJ4.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/8HGiyBsmSWM0Wd4tenvDMf8rKr2dbfJ4.jpg)![423EnuyoTj42HaU366EsBJE8TssPP5wT.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/423EnuyoTj42HaU366EsBJE8TssPP5wT.jpg)![Ww7YVIdQVB1wRLUFN34D8NZmqJazA6l3.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/Ww7YVIdQVB1wRLUFN34D8NZmqJazA6l3.jpg)![kYoHRMelcxvLIcNVHMKxn0QMsZIEiTni.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/kYoHRMelcxvLIcNVHMKxn0QMsZIEiTni.jpg)

[Blue Archive - Anime Expo 2024]

Attention All Anime Expo Senseis

Are you wearing a BLUE ARCHIVE COSTUME? Join us for a photo shoot gathering at #AX2024! General Director, Kim Yongha, will be there

🗓️Time: Today at 5PM July 5(PT)
📍Place: ENTERTAINMENT HALL(E55)

#BlueArchive
